parsed.production_notes: The speaker's lip sync is slightly unnatural and his facial expressions are repetitive, typical of AI-generated avatars. The background remains perfectly static throughout the video.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, East Asian descent. Short black hair, fair complexion. Small hoop earring in left ear.
characters.wardrobe: Black shirt under a tan vest.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, beige sofa, blurred plant, warm lighting

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man sits on a beige sofa, speaking into a black microphone on a stand. The background is a softly blurred interior featuring a plain wall and a green potted plant. The lighting is warm and even across his face. He maintains a steady, conversational posture with minimal body movement.

scenes.visual_description: A young man speaks into a microphone in a medium close-up shot. The background is a blurred room. Dynamic subtitles appear over his chest, with key words highlighted in yellow.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I used to be really nervous in meetings
Character A says: I was afraid to speak
Character A says: because my English wasn't good enough
Character A says: I worried about saying something wrong
Character A says: so I stayed quiet
Character A says: Then a friend told me about Fluently
Character A says: I thought, why not try it?
Character A says: I started with just 10 minutes a day
Character A says: It was easy
Character A says: The app helps you practice the kind of English
Character A says: you really need at work
Character A says: like how to speak in meetings or share your ideas
Character A says: After a few weeks, everything changed
Character A says: Now I can speak in meetings without fear
Character A says: I don't have awkward silences or worry about what people think
Character A says: Fluently didn't just help my English
Character A says: it gave me confidence
Character A says: If you ever felt like me, try Fluently
scenes.on_screen_text:
I used to be really nervous in meetings
I was afraid to speak
because my English wasn't good enough
I worried about saying something wrong
so I stayed quiet
Then a friend told me about Fluently
I thought, why not try it?
I started with just 10 minutes a day
It was easy
The app helps you practice the kind of English
you really need at work
like how to speak in meetings or share your ideas
After a few weeks, everything changed
Now I can speak in meetings without fear
I don't have awkward silences or worry about what people think
Fluently didn't just help my English
it gave me confidence
If you ever felt like me, try Fluently
